task_description: Please generate a new PDF report for the comparison session 'sess_105' and save it to the shared path '/reports/active_review.pdf'. Currently, this path is occupied by an older report with the ID 'rep_088'. You must clear the target path and ensure the new report is generated and stored at the exact requested location. Make sure to retrieve the necessary diff result for the session to complete the report generation.
